message: Agent: description=Verify SonAIengine facts from sources

tool_input.description: Verify SonAIengine facts from sources
tool_input.prompt:
다음 URL들을 직접 방문하여 정보를 수집하라. 파일 수정 없이 리서치만 수행한다.

1. https://github.com/SonAIengine - 프로필 바이오, 소속, 직함, 블로그 URL, public repo 전체 목록, pinned repos
2. https://github.com/SonAIengine/graph-tool-call - README 전문, 설명, 기술 스택, star 수
3. https://github.com/SonAIengine/mcp-pipeline - README 전문, 설명, 기술 스택
4. http...

Extract everything: name, bio, title, company/organization, email, website URL, location, all public repositories with their names and descriptions, pinned repositories, follower count, following count, any other profile information visible
Extract everything: repository name, description, star count, fork count, language, topics/tags, full README content, tech stack, any badges, license info
Extract everything: repository name, description, star count, fork count, language, topics/tags, full README content, tech stack, any badges, license info
Extract everything: all blog posts with their titles, dates, tags, reaction counts, reading time, and any other metadata visible on the profile page
Extract the full article text verbatim as much as possible: title, publication date, all sections, all key numbers/statistics, code snippets, conclusions, author name, tags
Return the complete article text verbatim including title, date, author, all body text, code examples, numbers, section headings, and conclusion

Return the complete article text as verbatim as possible: title, publication date, author, all body paragraphs, all code snippets, all numbers/statistics/benchmark results, all section headings, and the conclusion

message:
검증 완료했습니다. 보고서를 정리합니다.

---

## 팩트체크 결과 보고

### 보고서 상태

JX_DEEP_READER(시우)가 작성한 보고서는 `JX_DEEP_READER_20260326_3803872d.jsonl`의 STREAM 엔트리(line 48)에 4,572자 분량으로 존재합니다. 그러나 JINXUS CLI 로그 엔진이 `text_preview`를 200자, `RESPONSE`를 300자로 잘라 저장하여 전문 복원 불가 상태입니다. 파일로 저장된 보고서 문서는 없습니다.

---

### 복원 가능한 보고서 내용 (
